Why SecureLayer

Your AI Doesn't Know Enough About Security — Yet

Without the right prompt, AI assistants give vague, incomplete, or outright wrong security advice. SecureLayer fixes that.

🔒

Cybersecurity-Specific

Every prompt is written by security engineers. Coverage spans OWASP Top 10, network hardening, cloud security, secure coding, and compliance frameworks.

⚡

Token-Optimised

Prompts are engineered to extract maximum security depth with minimum token spend — so your AI budget goes further without sacrificing accuracy.

🎯

Expertise-Tuned

Junior dev or seasoned pentester — prompts adapt in depth, vocabulary, and assumed knowledge. No wasted context, no condescending explanations.

Custom contact us

Contact Us
Process

From Prompt to Secure Implementation

01

Pick your prompt

Choose a tested security prompt matched to your expertise level, stack, and objective — web hardening, cloud security, OWASP audit, or cert prep.

02

Fill in your context

Replace the [REPLACE] placeholders with your stack, framework, and specific requirements. The prompt already knows what to ask.

03

Run it — get real security

Paste into any AI assistant. Get precise, actionable security output — not generic advice. Verified by our engineers before it ever reached you.

Stop Trusting Untested AI Security Advice

Join developers and security teams who use SecureLayer prompts to get real, verified security output from every AI interaction.

Free tier available. No credit card required.
